scripts.dev:frontend: corepack pnpm --filter @word-god/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter frontend dev
scripts.dev:backend: corepack pnpm --filter @word-god/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter backend start:dev
scripts.build:mobile: corepack pnpm mobile:build-assets && corepack pnpm --filter @word-god/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter frontend build:mobile
scripts.build:mobile:placeholder: corepack pnpm mobile:build-assets:placeholder && corepack pnpm --filter @word-god/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter frontend build:mobile
scripts.android:sync: corepack pnpm build:mobile && corepack pnpm exec cap sync android
scripts.android:sync:placeholder: corepack pnpm build:mobile:placeholder && corepack pnpm exec cap sync android
scripts.android:debug: corepack pnpm android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:debug:placeholder: corepack pnpm android:sync:placeholder && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: corepack pnpm android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:release:placeholder: corepack pnpm android:sync:placeholder && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
